name: hvac-ai-orchestration
description: Stack-agnostic AI orchestration layer for the HVAC website. Enriches leads with weather and AQI data, routes to webhook or email. Works without any CMS, CRM, or AI provider — adapters are optional plugins.

scripts.validate:syntax: node --check server.js lib/rateLimit.js lib/validate.js lib/policy.js lib/tools/weather.js lib/tools/aqi.js lib/tools/serviceArea.js lib/adapters/webhook.js lib/adapters/email.js lib/routes/session.js lib/routes/lead.js lib/routes/handoff.js lib/routes/context.js
